creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: koobs
Date: Mon Jan 27 12:14:09 2014
New Revision: 341385
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/341385
QAT: https://qat.redports.org/buildarchive/r341385/

Log:
  Sweep www/py-requests dependants to www/py-requests1
  
  Point all www/py-requests dependants to www/py-requests1 in preparation for
  the upgrade of www/py-requests to version 2.x, which substantially breaks API
  compatibility.
  
  Maintainers of these ports can update their requests dependency independently
  as time for sufficient testing permits.
  
  PR:		ports/185631

Modified:
  head/audio/beets/Makefile
  head/audio/py-discogs-client/Makefile
  head/deskutils/dosage/Makefile
  head/devel/py-jira/Makefile
  head/devel/py-rauth/Makefile
  head/finance/py-stripe/Makefile
  head/multimedia/livestreamer/Makefile

  head/sysutils/pcbsd-utils/Makefile

  head/www/py-django-dpaste/Makefile
  head/www/py-flexget/Makefile
  head/www/py-grequests/Makefile

  head/www/py-requests-oauth-hook/Makefile

  head/www/py-slumber/Makefile
